description: Definition of AWS::BedrockAgentCore::Browser Resource Type. This is a read-only resource representing the default service-managed browser.

BrowserArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the browser.
BrowserArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the browser.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:[a-z0-9-]+:bedrock-agentcore:[a-z0-9-]+:(aws|[0-9]{12}):browser/aws\.browser\.v1$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

BrowserId.description: The unique identifier of the browser.
BrowserId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the browser.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^aws\.browser\.v1$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the browser.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Status.description: The current status of the browser.
Status.markdownDescription:
The current status of the browser.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: READY  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
